message:
feat(db,cli,guard): idempotent migration execution, FTS cleanup, schema hardening

crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/schema.rs:
- Add migration_statement_already_satisfied() that detects duplicate-
  column ALTER TABLE errors and verifies the column exists via
  pragma_table_info, making ADD COLUMN migrations idempotent.
- Add cleanup_legacy_message_fts_artifacts() to drop orphaned FTS
  triggers and tables from previous schema versions.
- Add helper functions: is_missing_fts_messages_error(),
  is_duplicate_column_error(), trim_sql_identifier(),
  parse_alter_table_add_column().

crates/mcp-agent-mail-db/src/pool.rs:
- Connection pool improvements (~37 lines).

crates/mcp-agent-mail-cli/src/lib.rs:
- CLI library enhancements (~49 lines).

crates/mcp-agent-mail-cli/src/robot.rs:
- Robot mode adjustments.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-core:
- ATC effect semantics, config, and pattern overlap refinements.

crates/mcp-agent-mail-guard, crates/mcp-agent-mail-server:
- Guard and server minor improvements.

tests/fixtures: Update doctor_check test fixture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
